candidate_check.description: The SUSE operating system must restrict privilege elevation to authorized personnel.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the "sudoers" file restricts sudo access to authorized personnel.
> sudo grep -iw 'ALL' /etc/sudoers /etc/sudoers.d/*

If the either of the following entries are returned, this is a finding:
ALL     ALL=(ALL) ALL
ALL     ALL=(ALL:ALL) ALL
fix_text_excerpt:
Remove the following entries from the sudoers file:
ALL     ALL=(ALL) ALL
ALL     ALL=(ALL:ALL) ALL
title: The SUSE operating system must restrict privilege elevation to authorized personnel.
